description_long: This is a 1-liter rectangular carton of Paradise Cocktail bottled water, featuring a predominantly blue and white design with a splash of water imagery at the top. The front displays the 'EVERYDAY A BETTER DAY' logo in red, the product name 'Paradise Cocktail' in bold blue and white, and a vibrant image of stacked fruit slices, suggesting a fruit-flavored water. The sides of the carton show nutritional information, a barcode, and multilingual product details. The carton is topped with a white plastic screw cap, slightly offset from the center. The surface appears to be made of laminated cardboard with a glossy finish, and the overall shape is tall and boxy with a flat base for stability.
description: A 1-liter rectangular carton of Paradise Cocktail bottled water with a blue and white design, fruit imagery, and a white screw cap. The packaging is glossy and features branding, nutritional info, and a vibrant front label.
description_view_0: The left side of the carton shows the brand's website, part of the logo, and some nutritional information.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the 'Paradise Cocktail' branding, fruit imagery, and the main product label.
description_view_2: The right side displays a barcode, additional product details, and part of the multilingual text.
description_view_3: The back view is dominated by nutritional facts, ingredients, and multilingual information.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'EVERYDAY A BETTER DAY' in red, 'Paradise Cocktail' in bold blue and white, a green 'Premium Quality' badge, and stacked fruit imagery. Sides and back have nutritional facts, barcode, website, and multilingual product info in black and blue text.
attribute_cap_type: White plastic screw cap, cylindrical with a flat top, slightly offset from the center.
attribute_transparency: The carton is opaque with no visible transparency; the contents are not visible through the packaging.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, slightly tapered neck integrated into the carton top, with a flat surface and a threaded area for the screw cap.
